A_CURRENT_TANTRA_ROLE.primary_function: Signal analysis, entity ranking, confidence scoring, decision support

signal_interpretation.description: Sanskar owns the transformation of input signals into interpretable features
signal_interpretation.scope: Feature engineering, normalization, signal quality assessment
signal_interpretation.authority_boundary: EXCLUSIVE - Sanskar controls feature derivation logic
signal_interpretation.governance_constraint: Feature derivation must be deterministic and replayable

entity_ranking.description: Sanskar owns the comparative ranking of entities
entity_ranking.scope: Score computation, confidence derivation, ranking order
entity_ranking.governance_constraint: Ranking methodology must be observable and auditable

confidence_scoring.scope: Signal quality metrics, score separation margins, confidence thresholds
confidence_scoring.governance_constraint: Confidence must reflect actual signal quality, not desired outcomes

trace_id_propagation.description: Sanskar owns passing trace_id through the pipeline unmodified
trace_id_propagation.scope: Trace_id must survive upstream→Sanskar→downstream without regeneration
trace_id_propagation.authority_boundary: EXCLUSIVE - Sanskar never regenerates or mutates trace_id
trace_id_propagation.governance_constraint: Trace continuity is non-negotiable for replay verification

legitimacy_decision.description: Sanskar does NOT own whether the decision is legitimate
legitimacy_decision.reason: Legitimacy is determined by external governance (RAJYA)
legitimacy_decision.implication: High confidence does not grant Sanskar execution permission
legitimacy_decision.verification: RAJYA validates all intelligence output before enforcement

governance_enforcement.description: Sanskar does NOT execute governance decisions
governance_enforcement.reason: Enforcement is owned by Enforcement and RAJYA layers
governance_enforcement.implication: Sanskar output is advisory, not mandatory
governance_enforcement.verification: Enforcement layer independently validates before action

replay_authority.description: Sanskar does NOT own the authority to decide replay validity
replay_authority.reason: Replay authority is determined by Bucket (truth persistence) and federated nodes
replay_authority.implication: Sanskar accepts replay input as-is or rejects it; no negotiation

observability_ownership.description: Sanskar does NOT own observability system configuration
observability_ownership.reason: Observability is governed by InsightBridge and centralized telemetry
observability_ownership.implication: Sanskar reports data; does not control what is observed
observability_ownership.verification: Observability configuration is external to Sanskar

downstream_policy.description: Sanskar does NOT own downstream participant policies
downstream_policy.reason: Each downstream participant (RAJYA, Bucket, InsightBridge) governs its own boundaries
downstream_policy.implication: Sanskar must conform to each downstream contract
downstream_policy.verification: Each participant validates Sanskar output against its own rules

EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_PROCESS_SIGNAL.right: Sanskar CAN process incoming signal contracts
constraints: Signal must contain valid trace_id
Signal schema must match contract version v1 or higher
Signal data must be within normalization bounds
Sanskar may reject signal on schema mismatch
EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_PROCESS_SIGNAL.failure_mode: REJECT - return failure contract with original trace_id

EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_COMPUTE_RANKING.right: Sanskar CAN compute entity rankings deterministically
constraints: Ranking computation must be bit-for-bit reproducible on replay
Ranking must be based on feature scores, not confidence
Ranking must include margin separation (runner-up comparison)
Tie-breaking must be deterministic (not random)
EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_COMPUTE_RANKING.failure_mode: FAIL - return computational failure with trace preserved

EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_PASS_OUTPUT.right: Sanskar CAN pass ranking output to downstream (RAJYA/Core)
constraints: Output must include complete trace_id from input
Output must include all entities and scores
Output must include confidence metadata
Output must include contract version
EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_PASS_OUTPUT.failure_mode: BLOCK - if contract validation fails, do not pass output

EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_DEFER_DECISION.right: Sanskar CAN mark decision_state as AMBIGUOUS or LOW_CONFIDENCE
constraints: AMBIGUOUS flag must reflect actual score separation < 0.1
LOW_CONFIDENCE flag must reflect signal quality issues
Flags must NOT prevent output transmission
Downstream participants MUST handle flagged decisions
EXECUTE_RIGHT_TO_DEFER_DECISION.failure_mode: WARN - flag decision state, pass output with warning

constraints: Sanskar may not directly call enforcement APIs
Sanskar may not modify Bucket data
Sanskar may not reject downstream calls
Sanskar may only output advisory rankings
EXECUTE_RIGHT_NOT_TO_EXECUTE.failure_mode: N/A - by design, Sanskar has no execution authority

upstream_participants.trace_property: Signal contains trace_id; Sanskar preserves it

downstream_participants.rajya_authority: RAJYA can REJECT Sanskar output if governance boundary violated
downstream_participants.trace_property: trace_id passes through RAJYA unchanged to Enforcement

downstream_participants.sanskar_involvement: Sanskar output is stored as immutable lineage record
downstream_participants.truth_persistence: Each stage's output stored with trace_id, timestamp, hash
downstream_participants.replay_authority: Bucket serves as authoritative source for replay verification
downstream_participants.trace_property: trace_id is primary key for lineage retrieval

downstream_participants.sanskar_telemetry: Sanskar reports execution metrics, score distributions, confidence levels
downstream_participants.observability_constraint: Sanskar reports data; does NOT control observability policies
downstream_participants.telemetry_sampling: InsightBridge controls sampling, retention, and alerting
downstream_participants.trace_property: Telemetry tagged with trace_id for correlation

downstream_participants.enforcement_autonomy: Enforcement may reject Sanskar directives if governance violated
downstream_participants.trace_property: Enforcement receives trace_id with all directives

enforcement_participant.validation_responsibility: Validates that Sanskar output respects governance constraints
enforcement_participant.boundary_enforcement: RAJYA can reject Sanskar output without explanation

influence_boundaries.sanskar_influence_on_core: ADVISORY - Core uses Sanskar ranking as input but makes independent decisions
influence_boundaries.sanskar_influence_on_rajya: INFORMATIVE - RAJYA validates independently; Sanskar influence is not authority
influence_boundaries.sanskar_influence_on_enforcement: ADVISORY - Enforcement validates directives; does not blindly execute
influence_boundaries.sanskar_influence_on_observability: REPORTING_ONLY - Sanskar reports; does not control what is observed
influence_boundaries.sanskar_influence_on_bucket: DATA_PRODUCER - Sanskar data is stored but not trusted without validation

input_validation.scope: Schema version, required fields, data types
input_validation.trace_property: Rejected input still includes trace_id in failure

output_validation.trace_property: Rejected output preserves trace_id for audit

replay_validation.scope: Output hash matches historical record, trace_id matches
replay_validation.rejection_authority: Bucket can reject replay if hash diverges
replay_validation.trace_property: Replay validation uses trace_id as key

schema_validation.rejection_authority: Any stage can reject schema mismatch
schema_validation.trace_property: Schema version is part of contract

replay_boundaries.sanskar_replay_responsibility: Sanskar reproduces exact output from input + historical replay record
replay_boundaries.determinism_requirement: Output must be bit-for-bit identical on replay
replay_boundaries.replay_divergence_handling: If Sanskar output diverges from Bucket record, Bucket record wins
replay_boundaries.trace_property: Replay uses trace_id to locate historical record

truth_boundaries.truth_authority_source: Bucket is the single source of truth for all executions
truth_boundaries.sanskar_truth_role: Sanskar outputs are stored in Bucket as immutable records
truth_boundaries.truth_mutability: Once stored in Bucket, Sanskar output cannot be mutated
truth_boundaries.truth_verification: All replay must verify against Bucket records
truth_boundaries.trace_property: Bucket indexes all records by trace_id
truth_boundaries.constitutional_alignment: Truth layer is constitutionally protected from Sanskar mutation

convergence_readiness.role_clarity: Sanskar role explicitly bounded and documented
convergence_readiness.authority_clarity: Authority owned vs. not owned explicitly declared
convergence_readiness.dependency_clarity: All participants and their relationships mapped
convergence_readiness.boundary_clarity: All influence, validation, replay, and truth boundaries declared
